steps.name: Add uncompleteArea to TripService
steps.criteria: TripService has uncompleteArea(area) method that removes area from completedAreas set and persists; getSweepProgress reflects the change; area is no longer in completedAreas after call
steps.scenario_name: uncompleteArea removes area from completed set

steps.name: Wire uncompleteArea through useTrip hook
steps.criteria: useTrip exposes uncompleteArea callback that calls tripService.uncompleteArea and updates sweepProgress state

phases.name: UI: Undo button on completed areas

steps.name: Show Undo button on completed area sections
steps.criteria: When an area is completed, AreaSection shows an Undo button (replacing or alongside the Complete badge); tapping it calls onUncompleteArea; area returns to non-completed state with items visible
